final:
// // This module selects between two 32-bit inputs based on the control signal RegRA. If RegRA is high (1), the output raRegData will be assigned the value of RegData; otherwise, it will assign the value of PCplus8.
module top_module(
	 input  RegRA,               
	 input  [31:0] RegData,      
	 input  [31:0] PCplus8,      
	 output  [31:0] raRegData    
	 );assign raRegData = RegRA ? PCplus8 : RegData;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two 32-bit inputs based on the control signal RegRA. If RegRA is high (1), the output raRegData will be assigned the value of RegData; otherwise, it will assign the value of PCplus8.
